final:
module RefModule(
    input       D,
    input       CLK,
    input       RST, 
    output  reg Q,
    output  reg NQ
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (!RST) begin
            Q <= 0;
            NQ <= 1;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
            NQ <= ~D;
        end
    end

endmodule
